subcodes.first_line: O Most Exalted Pen! Make mention of him who hath ascended unto the loftiest summit, and say: The first fragrance that wafted forth from the garment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا قلم الاعلی ان اذکر من صعد الی الذروه العلیا و قل اول عرف تضوع من قمیص
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
